questions.question: Describe the binary number system and explain the significance of base 2 in digital design. (6 marks)
A 4-bit binary counter is shown below. What is the next state of the counter when the binary number 0111 is inputted? (5 marks)
A 1-bit full adder has the following truth table: | A | B | Cin | Sum | Cout | Explain the operation of the full adder when A = 0, B = 0, and Cin = 1. (7 marks)
